rationale: Educ. Code §39.082 governs school district financial accountability rating systems and indicators. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict; indirect revenue effects do not trigger a statutory conflict.
quote: The system must include uniform indicators adopted by commissioner rule by which to measure the financial management performance and future financial solvency of a district or open-enrollment charter school.
_note: No direct conflict. Increasing the homestead exemption would reduce school district property tax revenue, which could indirectly affect financial solvency indicators under this section, but the statute contains no provision tied to specific exemption amounts.
